Both repositories and their Serena instances are present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' section states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and includes a concrete example: 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), correctly nested as a subsection.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 14-19: '## Step 2 -- Discover Serena Instances' states 'Scanned available MCP tools for the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern. assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)

The summary table (lines 48-53) shows all sections with status 'Created'.
